content.Text: [Mon 2026-04-20 02:36 PDT] Create a new dashboard page `dashboard/cost-anomaly.html` for AgentLens — a Cost Anomaly Detector with proactive cost monitoring. ## What to Build A standalone HTML page (like the existing costs.html, correlator.html etc.) that provides autonomous cost anomaly detection. Use the same styling approach — link to `styles.css` and use the same CSS variables (--bg-secondary, --border, --radius, --accent, --red, --green, --yellow, etc.). ## Features Required 1. **Anomaly Detection Engine** — Generate 90 days of simulated hourly cost data with realistic patterns (daily cycles, weekly patterns, occasional spikes). Use z-score and modified z-score (MAD) to detect anomalies. Display detected anomalies in a timeline. 2. **Cost Trend Canvas Chart** — Draw a time-series chart on HTML Canvas showing: - Hourly cost line - Rolling mean line - Upper/lower bounds (mean ± 2σ) - Red dots for detected anomalies - Tooltips on hover 3. **Budget Overrun Forecaster** — Linear regression on recent cost data to predict when the monthly budget will be exceeded. Show a gauge/progress bar with projected vs actual spend, days remaining, and estimated overrun date. 4. **Anomaly Feed** — Real-time scrolling feed of detected anomalies with: - Timestamp, severity (warning/critical), affected agent/model - Z-score value - Root cause hypothesis (auto-generated: "Token spike in agent-X", "Unusual model usage pattern", etc.) 5. **Optimization Recommendations** — Auto-generated actionable recommendations based on detected patterns: - "Switch agent-writer from GPT-4 to GPT-3.5 for drafts — est. savings $X/day" - "Cache repeated prompts for agent-analyzer — 34% duplicate rate detected" - "Set token limit on agent-researcher — 3 spikes >10K tokens this week" - Display as cards with estimated savings and confidence level 6. **Alert Configuration Panel** — Configure sensitivity (z-score threshold slider 1.5-4.0), monitoring window, budget limit, and alert channels (visual mock) 7. **Summary Stats Cards** at top: - Total anomalies detected (last 7d) - Estimated waste ($) - Budget utilization % - Anomaly trend (up/down arrow) ## Navigation Add a link to the navigation header. Look at dashboard/index.html's header section — it has `` links. Add one for this page: `🔮 Cost Anomaly`. Add this nav link to ALL existing dashboard HTML files that have the same header nav pattern (index.html, costs.html, errors.html, etc.). Search for the pattern of nav links in each .html file and add the new link. ## Style Requirements - Use `` for base styles - All custom styles in a `
